# PHAssetResourceUploadJob.Action.retry

**Case**

A job to retry processing.

## Declaration

```swift
case retry
```

## Discussion

An retryable job has a [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetResourceUploadJob/state-swift.property] of `failed` and hasn’t previously been retried.

Call [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetResourceUploadJobChangeRequest/retry(destination:)] to retry the job.

## Actions

- **PHAssetResourceUploadJob.Action.acknowledge**: A job that requires acknowledgement.
title: PHAssetResourceUploadJob.Action.retry
